docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO NOTICED MOTION TO VACATE MONEY JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100017255) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON DESPLAINES, LLC

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT TERRY PLATCHEK'S MOTION TO VACATE MONEY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF MONEY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED FOR A FURTHER STATUS REPORT ON AUG-15-2016 AT 9:30AM. THE COURT ORDERS THE PARTIES TO INFORM THE COURT WHETHER THE ILLINOIS MATTER IS APPEALED OR WHETHER THERE IS NO APPEAL, NO RESOLUTION. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Off Calendar

Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on THU-JUL-07-2016:
Ross A. Spector, Esq. of Spector & Bennett (T: 415.439.5390) appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff / opposing party;
Matthew A. Mallet, Esq. of the Law Offices of Kirk B. Freeman (T: 415.398.1082) appearing for Defendant / moving party Terry Platchek.

This matter is set for hearing of a Status Report of a hearing in Illinois. The parties report, the Plaintiff won the ruling in Illinois, Cook County. The appeal period is until July 28, 2016.

Defendant Terry Platchek's Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment is continued for a further Status Report on AUG-15-2016 at 9:30AM. The Court orders the parties to inform the Court whether the Illinois matter is appealed or whether there is no appeal, no resolution. Both parties waive notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)

Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Continued To Jul-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment is continued to July 7, 2016 pending the resolution of the hearing in Illinois. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Continued To Jun-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment is
continued to June 9, 2016. Parties to submit supplemental briefs (not to exceed 2 pages) by 4:00 p.m. on June 1, 2016 re: status of proceeding in Illinois. Enforcement of judgment is stayed until June 9, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT TERRY PLATCHEK'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment will be heard in Department 501, the Housing Court, on April 27, 2016 at 9:30am.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
